arts.sum: Fiorentina are coming off a terrible second half and a late 1-0 defeat to Verona on Sunday, which extended their losing streak to three matches. Lecce have also been winless in their last three games...

arts.ttl: Video: Ex-Lecce star Dorgu has nightmare for Manchester United
arts.sum: Former Lecce starlet Patrick Dorgu is having a rough start to life at Manchester United,...
